title: Principal Frontend Developer at Cyient Capital India

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Cyient Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Cyient Capital India in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cyient Capital India:
Cyient Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient Capital India!
